rationale: Paper proposes dynamic vision token pruning at inference time based on attention entropy — tokens with entropy below a threshold are dropped before the LLM layers. Claimed 40% token reduction with <2% accuracy drop on VQAv2. Extracted hypothesis record with applicability check: the technique operates on attention maps before the LLM layers, which is architecture-agnostic given access to intermediate activations. Flagging implementation_difficulty as minor-code-change (requires hook into the vision encoder forward pass) rather than config-change.
